name: Full-Force Strike
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>渾</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>こん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>身</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>しん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>の<ruby lang="jp"><rb>一</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>いち</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>撃</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>げき</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: Target 1 face-up monster you control; this turn, it cannot be destroyed by battle, players take no battle damage from its attacks, and if it attacks an opponent's monster, destroy that opponent's monster after damage calculation.
eff: Target 1 face-up monster you control; this turn, it cannot be destroyed by battle, players take no battle damage from its attacks, and if it attacks an opponent's monster, destroy that opponent's monster after damage calculation.

sets.set: Battle Pack 2: War of the Giants

mst: Destroys battling monster after damage calculation
